text: Guys, in today's video, I will give you an exercise and whoever solves this exercise, I will give a shoutout to them.
So, write in the comment section, Challenge Accepted.
If you accept my challenge, I will give you a question and you have to solve it.
And it will be based on the concepts we have studied in the Sigma Web Development course.
So, I am very excited to give you a question.
I hope you are equally excited.
